name: Calciforge Channel
description: Registers Calciforge as a native inbound channel so messages flow through OpenClaw's full agent runtime and replies are delivered back to Calciforge.

replyWebhook.description: URL to POST agent responses back to Calciforge, e.g. http://calciforge.lan:18797/hooks/reply

replyAuthToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating callbacks to Calciforge's reply webhook
